channel.title: NPR Topics: National
channel.description: NPR coverage of national news, U.S. politics, elections, business, arts, culture, health and science, and technology. Subscribe to the NPR Nation RSS feed.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Ahead of the World Cup, pressure to win and grow American soccer is on Tim Ream's mind
item.description: Hoping to make the roster for the U.S. Men's National team going to the World Cup, Tim Ream knows there's a lot riding on the tournament, from playing well to growing a new generation of fans at home.
item.content:encoded:
Hoping to make the roster for the U.S. Men's National team going to the World Cup, Tim Ream knows there's a lot riding on the tournament, from playing well to growing a new generation of fans at home.

(Image credit: Courtesy of Charlotte FC)
item.dc:creator: Jeffrey Pierre

item.title: In West Texas, an unlikely alliance stands against extending the border wall
item.description: An unusual coalition of people across the political spectrum have banded together to rally against a border wall in the Big Bend.
item.content:encoded: An unusual coalition of people across the political spectrum have banded together to rally against a border wall in the Big Bend.
item.dc:creator: Carlos Morales

item.title: 'Cemetery citizens' are restoring marginalized burial grounds in Connecticut
item.description: There's a volunteer movement to rehab overgrown cemeteries. We visit one in Connecticut, where "cemetery citizens" provide TLC to neglected plots.
item.content:encoded: There's a volunteer movement to rehab overgrown cemeteries. We visit one in Connecticut, where "cemetery citizens" provide TLC to neglected plots.
item.dc:creator: Meg Dalton

item.title: The removal of a whale mural in Dallas ahead of World Cup has caused a stir
item.description: A mural of whales promoting conservation was covered up in Dallas to make way for a new mural promoting the FIFA World Cup, which kicks off next month. But the project has stirred up controversy.
item.content:encoded: A mural of whales promoting conservation was covered up in Dallas to make way for a new mural promoting the FIFA World Cup, which kicks off next month. But the project has stirred up controversy.
item.dc:creator: Marcheta Fornoff

item.title: An older kid stepped up to save him from bullies — and changed his life
item.description: As a sixth-grader, Darrell Barber was the new kid at school and a target for bullies. An eighth-grader named Marcus became his protector.
item.content:encoded: As a sixth-grader, Darrell Barber was the new kid at school and a target for bullies. An eighth-grader named Marcus became his protector.
item.dc:creator: Mallory Yu

item.title: Interest in war reenactments surges ahead of America's 250th
item.description: As America approaches its 250th anniversary, not only has interest in watching historical war reenactments surged – interest in those participating as actors in costume has, too.
item.content:encoded: As America approaches its 250th anniversary, not only has interest in watching historical war reenactments surged – interest in those participating as actors in costume has, too.
item.dc:creator: Erika Tulfo

item.title: After Stephen Colbert's viral talk show parody, CBS backs down from copyright action
item.description: CBS and Paramount backed away from copyright challenges to limit distribution of Stephen Colbert's appearance on a Michigan cable access show. He ended his run as host of "The Late Show" on Thursday.
item.content:encoded:
CBS and Paramount backed away from copyright challenges to limit distribution of Stephen Colbert's appearance on a Michigan cable access show. He ended his run as host of "The Late Show" on Thursday.

(Image credit: Evan Agostini/Evan Agostini/Invision/AP)
item.dc:creator: Brian Mann

item.title: Trump to get 'routine annual' medical exam 7 months after last visit to Walter Reed
item.description: White House boasts Trump's "excellent health" as questions loom over the medical reality of the oldest inaugurated president.
item.content:encoded:
White House boasts Trump's "excellent health" as questions loom over the medical reality of the oldest inaugurated president.

(Image credit: Alex Brandon)
item.dc:creator: Luke Garrett

item.title: Suspected gunman killed after opening fire near White House identified
item.description: Law enforcement officials have released more information about a shooting near the White House on Saturday, including the identity of the alleged gunman.
item.content:encoded: Law enforcement officials have released more information about a shooting near the White House on Saturday, including the identity of the alleged gunman.
item.dc:creator: Chandelis Duster

item.title: 'My body carried me,' Elizabeth Smart says. Now she's celebrating it
item.description: Her abduction at age 14 drew international attention. After her rescue, Smart says she struggled with feeling shame around her body. Bodybuilding has helped her see herself differently.
item.content:encoded:
Her abduction at age 14 drew international attention. After her rescue, Smart says she struggled with feeling shame around her body. Bodybuilding has helped her see herself differently.

(Image credit: Kim Raff for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Windsor Johnston
